schema_version.description: Version of this manifest document shape (manifest.schema).

schema_family.description: Optional schema family marker to support versioned inheritance.

extends_schema_version.description: Optional parent schema version used by migration-aware consumers.

bundle_spec_version.description: Capture Bundle v1 semantic version (must match repository VERSION for official releases).

capture_session_id.description: Optional logical session identifier shared across companion devices.

hash_algorithm.description: Digest algorithm for file entries. Only sha256 is defined for v1.

root_pose_frame.description: Declares which convention applies to pose.jsonl (excluding custom).

propertyNames.description: POSIX-style relative path from bundle root; must not be manifest.json.

size_bytes.description: Byte length of the file on disk (raw bytes).

media_type.description: Optional MIME type hint for tooling.

files.description: Relative POSIX paths from bundle root to file descriptors. manifest.json MUST NOT be self-listed; its integrity is verified out-of-band or via wrapper manifest where applicable.
